name: libnacl

metadata.name: libnacl
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Python bindings for libsodium based on ctypes

documentation:
# Python libnacl

This library is used to gain direct access to the functions exposed by
Daniel J. Bernstein's nacl library via libsodium. It has
been constructed to maintain extensive documentation on how to use nacl
as well as being completely portable. The file in libnacl/\_\_init\_\_.py
can be pulled out and placed directly in any project to give a single file
binding to all of nacl.

## Higher Level Classes

The libnacl code also ships with many high level classes which make nacl
cryptography easy and safe, for documentation please see:
<http://libnacl.readthedocs.org/>

## Why libnacl

There are a number of libraries out there binding to libsodium, so why make
libnacl?

1. libnacl does not have any non-python hard deps outside of libsodium
2. libnacl does not need to be compiled
3. libnacl is easy to package and very portable
4. Inclusion of high level pythonic encryption classes
5. Ability to have a single embeddable and transferable bindings file
   that can be added directly to python applications without needing
   to dep libnacl

This makes libnacl very portable, very easy to use and easy to distribute.

## Install

The libnacl code is easiy installed via a setup.py from the source or via pip.

From Source:

```bash
tar xvf libnacl-1.5.2.tar.gz
cd libnacl-1.5.2
python setup.py install
```

Via Pip:

```bash
pip install libnacl
```

Remember that libnacl can be installed for python 2 and 3.

### Linux distributions

Libnacl is shiped with many linux distributions, check your distribution
package manager for the package `python-libnacl`, `python2-libnacl`
and/or `python3-libnacl`.

modules.name: libnacl.dual
documentation:
The dual key system allows for the creation of keypairs that contain both
cryptographic and signing keys

classes.name: libnacl.dual.DualSecret

methods.name: libnacl.dual.DualSecret.sign
documentation: Sign the given message

methods.name: libnacl.dual.DualSecret.signature
documentation: Return just the signature for the message
Manage crypt and sign keys in one object

modules.name: libnacl.utils
documentation: -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

functions.name: libnacl.utils.load_key
documentation:
Read in a key from a file and return the applicable key object based on
the contents of the file

functions.name: libnacl.utils.salsa_key
documentation: Generates a salsa2020 key

functions.name: libnacl.utils.aead_key
documentation: Generates an AEAD key (both implementations use the same size)

functions.name: libnacl.utils.rand_aead_nonce
documentation:
Generates and returns a random bytestring of the size defined in libsodium
as crypto_aead_aes256gcm_NPUBBYTES and crypto_aead_chacha20poly1305_ietf_NPUBBYTES

functions.name: libnacl.utils.rand_aead_xchacha_nonce
documentation:
Generates and returns a random bytestring of the size defined in libsodium
as crypto_aead_aes256gcm_NPUBBYTES and crypto_aead_chacha20poly1305_ietf_NPUBBYTES

functions.name: libnacl.utils.rand_nonce
documentation:
Generates and returns a random bytestring of the size defined in libsodium
as crypto_box_NONCEBYTES

functions.name: libnacl.utils.time_nonce
documentation:
Generates and returns a nonce as in rand_nonce() but using a timestamp for the first 8 bytes.

This function now exists mostly for backwards compatibility, as rand_nonce() is usually preferred.

modules.name: libnacl.public
documentation: High level classes and routines around public key encryption and decryption
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

classes.name: libnacl.public.PublicKey
documentation: This class is used to manage public keys

classes.name: libnacl.public.SecretKey

methods.name: libnacl.public.SecretKey.__init__
documentation: If a secret key is not passed in then it will be generated
This class is used to manage keypairs

classes.name: libnacl.public.Box

methods.name: libnacl.public.Box.encrypt
documentation:
Encrypt the given message with the given nonce, if the nonce is not
provided it will be generated from the libnacl.utils.rand_nonce
function

methods.name: libnacl.public.Box.decrypt
documentation:
Decrypt the given message, if a nonce is passed in attempt to decrypt
it with the given nonce, otherwise assum that the nonce is attached
to the message

TheBox class is used to create cryptographic boxes and unpack
cryptographic boxes

classes.name: libnacl.sealed.SealedBox

methods.name: libnacl.sealed.SealedBox.encrypt
documentation: Encrypt the given message using the receiver's public key

methods.name: libnacl.sealed.SealedBox.decrypt
documentation: Decrypt the given message using the receiver's public and private key
Sealed box is a variant of Box that does not authenticate sender.

modules.name: libnacl.aead
documentation: Utilities to make secret box encryption simple
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

classes.name: libnacl.aead.AEAD

methods.name: libnacl.aead.AEAD.encrypt
documentation:
Encrypt the given message. If a nonce is not given it will be
generated via the rand_nonce function

methods.name: libnacl.aead.AEAD.decrypt
documentation:
Decrypt the given message, if no nonce or aad are given they will be
extracted from the message

methods.name: libnacl.aead.AEAD.decrypt_unpacked
documentation:
Decrypt the given message, if no nonce or aad are given they will be
extracted from the message
Manage AEAD encryption using the IETF ChaCha20-Poly1305(default) or AES-GCM algorithm

modules.name: libnacl.blake
documentation:
Mimic very closely the python hashlib classes for blake2b

NOTE:
    This class does not yet implement streaming the msg into the
    hash function via the update method

functions.name: libnacl.blake.blake2b
documentation:
Create and return a Blake2b object to mimic the behavior of the python
hashlib functions

documentation: Return the digest of the string

modules.name: libnacl
documentation: Wrap libsodium routines
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

functions.name: libnacl._get_nacl
documentation: Locate the nacl c libs to use

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_box_keypair
documentation:
Generate and return a new keypair

pk, sk = nacl.crypto_box_keypair()
Pubkey defs

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_box_seed_keypair
documentation: Generate and return a keypair from a key seed

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_scalarmult_base
documentation:
Compute and return the scalar product of a standard group element and the given integer.

This can be used to derive a Curve25519 public key from a Curve25519 secret key,
such as for usage with crypto_box and crypto_box_seal.

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_box
documentation:
Using a public key and a secret key encrypt the given message. A nonce
must also be passed in, never reuse the nonce

enc_msg = nacl.crypto_box('secret message', <unique nonce>, <public key string>, <secret key string>)

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_box_open
documentation: Decrypts a message given the receiver's private key, and sender's public key

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_box_easy
documentation:
Using a public key and a secret key encrypt the given message. A nonce
must also be passed in, never reuse the nonce

enc_msg = nacl.crypto_box_easy('secret message', <unique nonce>, <public key string>, <secret key string>)

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_box_open_easy
documentation: Decrypts a message given the receiver's private key, and sender's public key

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_box_beforenm
documentation: Partially performs the computation required for both encryption and decryption of data

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_box_afternm
documentation: Encrypts a given a message, using partial computed data

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_box_open_afternm
documentation: Decrypts a ciphertext ctxt given k

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_box_easy_afternm
documentation:
Using a precalculated shared key, encrypt the given message. A nonce
must also be passed in, never reuse the nonce

enc_msg = nacl.crypto_box_easy_afternm('secret message', <unique nonce>, <shared key string>)

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_box_open_easy_afternm
documentation: Decrypts a ciphertext ctxt given k

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_box_seal
documentation:
Using a public key to encrypt the given message. The identity of the sender cannot be verified.

enc_msg = nacl.crypto_box_seal('secret message', <public key string>)

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_box_seal_open
documentation: Decrypts a message given the receiver's public and private key.

documentation: Verifies the signed message sig using the signer's verification key

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_sign_verify_detached
documentation: Verifies that sig is a valid signature for the message msg using the signer's verification key

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_secretbox
documentation:
Encrypts and authenticates a message using the given secret key, and nonce

Args:
    message (bytes): a message to encrypt
    nonce (bytes): nonce, does not have to be confidential must be
        `crypto_secretbox_NONCEBYTES` in length
    key (bytes): secret key, must be `crypto_secretbox_KEYBYTES` in
        length

Returns:
    bytes: the ciphertext

Raises:
    ValueError: if arguments' length is wrong or the operation has failed.
Authenticated Symmetric Encryption

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_secretbox_open
documentation:
Decrypts a ciphertext ctxt given the receivers private key, and senders
public key

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_secretbox_easy
documentation: Authenticated Symmetric Encryption improved version

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_aead_aes256gcm_encrypt
documentation:
Encrypts and authenticates a message with public additional data using the given secret key, and nonce

Args:
    message (bytes): a message to encrypt
    aad  (bytes): additional public data to authenticate
    nonce (bytes): nonce, does not have to be confidential must be
        `crypto_aead_aes256gcm_NPUBBYTES` in length
    key (bytes): secret key, must be `crypto_aead_aes256gcm_KEYBYTES` in
        length

Returns:
    bytes: the ciphertext

Raises:
    ValueError: if arguments' length is wrong or the operation has failed.
Authenticated Symmetric Encryption with Additional Data

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_aead_chacha20poly1305_ietf_encrypt
documentation:
Encrypts and authenticates a message with public additional data using the given secret key, and nonce

Args:
    message (bytes): a message to encrypt
    aad  (bytes): additional public data to authenticate
    nonce (bytes): nonce, does not have to be confidential must be
        `crypto_aead_chacha20poly1305_ietf_NPUBBYTES` in length
    key (bytes): secret key, must be `crypto_aead_chacha20poly1305_ietf_KEYBYTES` in
        length

Returns:
    bytes: the ciphertext

Raises:
    ValueError: if arguments' length is wrong or the operation has failed.

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_aead_xchacha20poly1305_ietf_encrypt
documentation:
Encrypts and authenticates a message with public additional data using the given secret key, and nonce

Args:
    message (bytes): a message to encrypt
    aad  (bytes): additional public data to authenticate
    nonce (bytes): nonce, does not have to be confidential must be
        `crypto_aead_xchacha20poly1305_ietf_NPUBBYTES` in length
    key (bytes): secret key, must be `crypto_aead_chacha20poly1305_ietf_KEYBYTES` in
        length

Returns:
    bytes: the ciphertext

Raises:
    ValueError: if arguments' length is wrong or the operation has failed.

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_aead_aes256gcm_decrypt
documentation:
Decrypts a ciphertext ctxt given the key, nonce, and aad. If the aad
or ciphertext were altered then the decryption will fail.

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_aead_chacha20poly1305_ietf_decrypt
documentation:
Decrypts a ciphertext ctxt given the key, nonce, and aad. If the aad
or ciphertext were altered then the decryption will fail.

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_aead_xchacha20poly1305_ietf_decrypt
documentation:
Decrypts a ciphertext ctxt given the key, nonce, and aad. If the aad
or ciphertext were altered then the decryption will fail.

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_stream
documentation: Generates a stream using the given secret key and nonce
Symmetric Encryption

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_stream_xor
documentation:
Encrypts the given message using the given secret key and nonce

The crypto_stream_xor function guarantees that the ciphertext is the
plaintext (xor) the output of crypto_stream. Consequently
crypto_stream_xor can also be used to decrypt

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_auth
documentation:
Constructs a one time authentication token for the given message msg
using a given secret key
Authentication

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_auth_verify
documentation:
Verifies that the given authentication token is correct for the given
message and key

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_onetimeauth_primitive
documentation:
Return the onetimeauth underlying primitive

Returns:
    str: always ``poly1305``
One time authentication

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_onetimeauth
documentation:
Constructs a one time authentication token for the given message using
a given secret key

Args:
    message (bytes): message to authenticate.
    key (bytes): secret key - must be of crypto_onetimeauth_KEYBYTES length.

Returns:
    bytes: an authenticator, of crypto_onetimeauth_BYTES length.

Raises:
    ValueError: if arguments' length is wrong.

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_onetimeauth_verify
documentation:
Verifies, in constant time, that `token` is a correct authenticator for
the message using the secret key.

Args:

: token (bytes): an authenticator of crypto_onetimeauth_BYTES length.
  message (bytes): The message to authenticate.
  key: key (bytes): secret key - must be of crypto_onetimeauth_KEYBYTES

  > length.

Returns:

: bytes: secret key - must be of crypto_onetimeauth_KEYBYTES length.

Raises:

: ValueError: if arguments' length is wrong or verification has failed.

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_hash
documentation: Compute a hash of the given message
Hashing

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_hash_sha256
documentation: Compute the sha256 hash of the given message

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_hash_sha512
documentation: Compute the sha512 hash of the given message

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_generichash
documentation: Compute the blake2 hash of the given message with a given key
Generic Hash

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_verify_16
documentation:
Compares the first crypto_verify_16_BYTES of the given strings

The time taken by the function is independent of the contents of string1
and string2. In contrast, the standard C comparison function
memcmp(string1,string2,16) takes time that is dependent on the longest
matching prefix of string1 and string2. This often allows for easy
timing attacks.
String cmp

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_verify_32
documentation:
Compares the first crypto_verify_32_BYTES of the given strings

The time taken by the function is independent of the contents of string1
and string2. In contrast, the standard C comparison function
memcmp(string1,string2,32) takes time that is dependent on the longest
matching prefix of string1 and string2. This often allows for easy
timing attacks.

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_verify_64
documentation:
Compares the first crypto_verify_64_BYTES of the given strings

The time taken by the function is independent of the contents of string1
and string2. In contrast, the standard C comparison function
memcmp(string1,string2,64) takes time that is dependent on the longest
matching prefix of string1 and string2. This often allows for easy
timing attacks.

functions.name: libnacl.bytes_eq
documentation:
Compares two byte instances with one another. If `a` and `b` have
different lengths, return `False` immediately. Otherwise `a` and `b`
will be compared in constant time.

Return `True` in case `a` and `b` are equal. Otherwise `False`.

Raises {exc}`TypeError` in case `a` and `b` are not both of the type
{class}`bytes`.

functions.name: libnacl.randombytes
documentation: Return a string of random bytes of the given size
Random byte generation

functions.name: libnacl.randombytes_buf
documentation: Return a string of random bytes of the given size

functions.name: libnacl.randombytes_buf_deterministic
documentation:
Returns a string of random byles of the given size for a given seed. 
For a given seed, this function will always output the same sequence. 
Size can be up to 2^70 (256 GB).

functions.name: libnacl.randombytes_close
documentation:
Close the file descriptor or the handle for the cryptographic service
provider

functions.name: libnacl.randombytes_random
documentation: Return a random 32-bit unsigned value

functions.name: libnacl.randombytes_stir
documentation:
Generate a new key for the pseudorandom number generator

The file descriptor for the entropy source is kept open, so that the
generator can be reseeded even in a chroot() jail.

functions.name: libnacl.randombytes_uniform
documentation: Return a value between 0 and upper_bound using a uniform distribution

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_kdf_keygen
documentation: Returns a string of random bytes to generate a master key
Key derivation API

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_kdf_derive_from_key
documentation:
Returns a subkey generated from a master key for a given subkey_id. 
For a given subkey_id, the subkey will always be the same string.

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_kx_keypair
documentation: Generate and return a new keypair
Key Exchange API

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_kx_seed_keypair
documentation: Generate and return a keypair from a key seed

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_kx_client_session_keys
documentation:
Computes a pair of shared keys (rx and tx) using the client's public key client_pk, 
the client's secret key client_sk and the server's public key server_pk.
Status returns 0 on success, or -1 if the server's public key is not acceptable.

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_kx_server_session_keys
documentation:
Computes a pair of shared keys (rx and tx) using the server's public key server_pk, 
the server's secret key server_sk and the client's public key client_pk.
Status returns 0 on success, or -1 if the client's public key is not acceptable.

functions.name: libnacl.sodium_library_version_major
documentation: Return the major version number
Utility functions

functions.name: libnacl.sodium_library_version_minor
documentation: Return the minor version number

functions.name: libnacl.sodium_version_string
documentation: Return the version string

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_sign_ed25519_pk_to_curve25519
documentation: Convert an Ed25519 public key to a Curve25519 public key

functions.name: libnacl.crypto_sign_ed25519_sk_to_curve25519
documentation: Convert an Ed25519 secret key to a Curve25519 secret key

classes.name: libnacl.CryptError
documentation: Base Exception for cryptographic errors
Define exceptions

modules.name: libnacl.kx
documentation:
Implementation of the X25519 Key Exchange function. These classes make executing a key
exchange simple.

classes.name: libnacl.kx.ExchangeKey

methods.name: libnacl.kx.ExchangeKey.client_session_keys
documentation: Takes a remote public key and derives the rx and tx session keys

methods.name: libnacl.kx.ExchangeKey.server_session_keys
documentation: Takes a remote public key and derives the rx and tx session keys

methods.name: libnacl.kx.ExchangeKey.encrypt_client
documentation: Encrypt the given message using the remote_sk

methods.name: libnacl.kx.ExchangeKey.encrypt_server
documentation: Encrypt the given message using the remote_sk
The class used to manage key exchange keys
